result.stdout:
Chimpiler - A multi-purpose CLI tooling ecosystem

Usage:
  chimpiler [command] [options]

Available Commands:
  ef-migrate    Generate DACPACs from EF Core DbContext models
  clawcker      Manage local OpenClaw instances using Docker
  help          Display help information for Chimpiler or a specific subcommand

Options:
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information
  --version         Show version information

Use 'chimpiler help [command]' for more information about a command.
